introductionDetail.brief:
AI GRAVITY is dedicated to using Al as a bridge to connect emerging innovation markets across the Asia-Pacific, Middle East, and Europe.
By creating a high-level customized platform for region-focused activities, engaging governments, enterprises, investors, and academia, Al GRAVITY fosters a cross-border Al ecosystem that enables knowedge sharing, technology adoption, and business colaboration - empowering regional Al ecosystems to achieve long-term growth and breakthrough innovation.
introductionDetail.briefEn:
AI GRAVITY is dedicated to using Al as a bridge to connect emerging innovation markets across the Asia-Pacific, Middle East, and Europe.
By creating a high-level customized platform for region-focused activities, engaging governments, enterprises, investors, and academia, Al GRAVITY fosters a cross-border Al ecosystem that enables knowedge sharing, technology adoption, and business colaboration - empowering regional Al ecosystems to achieve long-term growth and breakthrough innovation.
